zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Berney於大約1430年出生在英國諾福爾可時，她的父親Esquire Thomas Berney48歲，母親Elizabeth Clipsby26歲。她和Osbert Mondeford至少有1個女兒。她去世於1460年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可特福德享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Berney于大约1430年出生在英国諾福爾可时，她的父亲Esquire Thomas Berney48岁，母亲Elizabeth Clipsby26岁。她和Osbert Mondeford至少有1个女儿。她去世于1460年在英国英格兰諾福爾可特福德享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Berney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’. See Burney 2 and McBurney .
French: from a derivative of the personal name Bernard or any other name composed of the ancient Germanic element ber(n) ‘bear’.

variants.name: Burney
meanings: English (northern, of Norman origin): habitational name from Bernay in Eure, France, named with a Gaulish personal name Brenno + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish (Antrim) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’, a Gaelic form of the Old Norse personal name Bjarni (from björn ‘bear cub, warrior’).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Berney was born about 1430, in Norfolk, England, her father, Esquire Thomas Berney, was 48 and her mother, Elizabeth Clipsby, was 26. She had at least 1 daughter with Osbert Mondeford. She died in 1460, in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Berney est née environ 1430, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Esquire Thomas Berney, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Clipsby, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Osbert Mondeford. Elle est décédée en 1460, à Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Berney um 1430 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Esquire Thomas Berney 48 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Clipsby 26. Sie hatte mit Osbert Mondeford mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Berney è nata il circa 1430 nel Norfolk, England, sua padre, Esquire Thomas Berney, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Clipsby, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Osbert Mondeford. Morì nel 1460, nel Thetford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Berneyが約1430年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Esquire Thomas Berneyは48歳，母Elizabeth Clipsbyは26歳であった。彼女はOsbert Mondefordとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1460年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Berney(이)가 대략 1430년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Esquire Thomas Berney(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Clipsby(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Osbert Mondeford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 테트퍼드에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Berney nasceu aproximadamente 1430, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Esquire Thomas Berney, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Clipsby, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Osbert Mondeford. Ela faleceu em 1460, em Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Berney родилась около 1430 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Esquire Thomas Berney было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Clipsby, 26. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Osbert Mondeford. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности тетфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Berney nació aproximadamente 1430, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Esquire Thomas Berney, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Clipsby, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Osbert Mondeford. Murió en 1460, en Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años.
